name: studio
description: Living agent team with stable review cycles, evidence reuse, and reason-gated delta/full QA.

interface.shortDescription: Run a quality-gated living agent team with local context and optional external executors.
interface.longDescription: The owner gives a mission; Studio owns the mission, QualityPlan, Context Kernel, stable review cycle, evidence-based completion, and owner gates. Findings keep their identity across physical runs, unaffected evidence can be reused by deterministic pins, and full QA or fresh context requires a structured reason. task-github and wiki-markdown remain optional agent-visible providers rather than hard dependencies.
defaultPrompt: Use $producer to run a mission through the living agent team.
The producer convenes crew into background runs; it never makes artifacts itself.
Require artifact and context evidence to pass QualityPlan floors before integration.
Continue fixes and delta QA in one stable review cycle; require a reason for full QA or fresh context.
Owner gates: mission contract, new epic, irreversible, external-publish, budget-raise.
